changelog:
v1.3.0 Updates:
- Fixed: Messages now send reliably when phone is locked
- Fixed: Reply cache now works for saved contacts (extracts phone from shortcutId)
- Fixed: Update installer now installs correct APK (no stale file)
- Messages deferred while phone locked, sent automatically on unlock
- Improved notification cache with 6 extraction methods
- AlarmManager polling for reliable background operation
- WiFi lock keeps network alive during Doze mode
